creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
I've changed PORTNAME and forgot to test fetch target. Here is a fix
--- a.diff begins here ---
--- Makefile~
+++ Makefile
@@ -9,12 +9,13 @@ PORTNAME=	libgme
 PORTVERSION=	0.5.5
 CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}
-DISTNAME=	game-music-emu-${PORTVERSION}
+DISTNAME=	${PROJECTHOST}-${PORTVERSION}
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tbz2
 
 MAINTAINER=	swell.k@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	A collection of video game music emulators
 
+PROJECTHOST=	game-music-emu
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
 USE_CMAKE=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
--- a.diff ends here ---
